title: cordia dewevrei
intro: Cordia dewevrei, also known as the African bushwillow, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia dewevrei include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of hypertension. The herbal preparations of Cordia dewevrei include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including malaria, colds, and digestive issues.
